ast.name: error
ast.source: Character regex broken; char ext segment should exist
ast.target: 字符正则表达式错误；字符扩展段应存在

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fix Fountain formatting on themes like Minimal.
ast.target: 修复在 Minimal 等主题上的 Fountain 格式问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skips trying to convert single-lines that start with `>` from Obsidian blockquotes into Fountain's Transitions. Blockquotes are the preferred cleaner way to annotate your screenplay, but you will need to strip them out before rendering your Fountain document to PDF.
ast.target: 跳过尝试将以 `>` 开头的单行文本从 Obsidian 块引用转换为 Fountain 的转场。块引用是更清晰、更受推荐的剧本注释方式，但在将 Fountain 文档渲染为 PDF 前，您需要将其移除。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fix broken styling on certain themes
ast.target: 修复某些主题上的样式错误

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Prefer Obsidian's blockquote over Fountain's forced Transition
ast.target: 优先使用 Obsidian 的块引用而非 Fountain 的强制转场
